update.releaseNotes:
v1.0.2 - Changelog
> [!NOTE] > Jacob-Met custom fork (Trackblazer). Based on upstream v5.6.1.
Advanced settings & overlay resume --- - New **Advanced Settings** page — per-action delay tuning and delay calibration from Home-button sessions. - **Overlay pause/resume controls** — optional recheck of skills, agenda reload, and shop when restarting from the floating overlay button (all off by default). - Conditional overlay options — recheck shop when turn changes; recheck skills when over skill-point threshold. - Mid-flow resume — if paused inside skill list, shop, or agenda UI, bot continues that flow on restart. - **Live settings reload** — SQLite changes apply to a running bot without Home restart.
First-run & data --- - **First-run wizard** — storage folder picker, legacy log/recording migration, permission checks on first launch. - **Taiki Shuttle / Sweep Tosho** training event data (Camping 2026-06-10). - Automation library bumped to 2.5.7 for storage bridge support.
Other --- - Unique race strategy overrides UI. - Runtime settings notifier wired after every settings save. - Maiden race detection — any completed non-maiden race marks the debut step done (fixes stale fan-tier OCR re-checking maiden every turn). - Advanced Settings crash fix — corrected CustomSlider min/max props on the delay calibration page.
